title: NoPhantom
body:
It prevents Phantoms from springing up. \ Usage:
Enable/Disable Phantoms: Use the /nophantom on command to prevent Phantoms from spawning or /nophantom off to allow them to spawn again. Confirmation Messages: Upon successful execution of the commands, the plugin will notify players about the current Phantom status. Note: The plugin will initially set Phantoms to be disabled by default when it is enabled
